reviews.comment:
El servicio de mecánica es muy confiable, David es muy honesto, buena onda y sabe mucho. Me asesoró sobre una falla a pesar de que ya estaban por cerrar.

(Translated by Google)
The mechanic service is very reliable, David is very honest, friendly, and knowledgeable. He advised me on a problem even though they were about to close.

reviews.comment:
9 y media de la noche todo cerrado incluso los baños. El empleado le puso onda pero ni siquiera pude pagar con la aplicacion que queria. Perdi un monton de tiempo. Le pongo 2 de onda.

(Translated by Google)
9:30 PM, everything was closed, even the restrooms. The employee was helpful, but I couldn't even pay with the app I wanted. I wasted a lot of time. I'd give it a 2 out of 10 for helpfulness.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoMkxtemtRRRAB
